title: Login broken after latest update
description: Users on Okta SSO are being logged out every 5 minutes. Started after the v2.4.2 deploy.

title: CSV export times out above 500 rows
description: The bulk export feature spins indefinitely when trying to download more than 500 rows. Only started after v2.4.1.

title: Invoice PDF missing line items
description: Our 20-line invoice only shows 14 items in the PDF. The last 6 are cut off.

title: Push notifications silent on iOS 17.4
description: After upgrading to iOS 17.4 all push notifications stopped arriving. Badge counter stuck at 0.

title: Webhook retries flooding our endpoint
description: Your service is sending 50+ retries for a single event. This is hitting our rate limit.

title: Charts blank in Safari 17
description: All dashboard charts are completely blank when viewed in Safari 17. Works fine in Chrome.

title: Search not finding recently added contacts
description: I added 50 new contacts via CSV import 3 hours ago and none of them appear in search.

title: 2FA SMS code arrives 10 minutes late
description: The two-factor authentication code arrives by SMS around 10 minutes late. By then it's expired.

title: Recurring events missing from calendar sync
description: My weekly team standup has disappeared from the calendar after syncing with Google Calendar.

title: Cannot export quarterly financial report
description: Our finance team needs the Q2 export but every attempt times out at exactly 503 rows.
